languages.original_text: {n}Not looking up from his examination of Nuncius, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader?"

languages.text: {n}Не отрываясь от осмотра Нунциуса, Эоганн кивает.{/n} "Вольный Торговец?"
{n}Not looking up from his examination of Nuncius, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader?"

{n}Not looking up from his examination of Nuncius, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader?"

languages.text: {n}Sin levantar la mirada de Nuncius mientras lo examina, Eogunn asiente.{/n} «¿Comerciante?».
languages.original_text: {n}Not looking up from his examination of Nuncius, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Sin levantar la mirada de Nuncius mientras lo examina, Eogunn asiente.{/n} «¿Comerciante?».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡没有抬头。他一边检查着努恩修斯，一边点了点头。{/n}“行商浪人？”
languages.original_text: {n}Not looking up from his examination of Nuncius, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader?"

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡没有抬头。他一边检查着努恩修斯，一边点了点头。{/n}“行商浪人？”

languages.text: {n}Sans quitter Nuncius des yeux, Eogunn acquiesce.{/n} « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande} ? »
languages.original_text: {n}Not looking up from his examination of Nuncius, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Sans quitter Nuncius des yeux, Eogunn acquiesce.{/n} « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande} ? »

languages.original_text: {n}Not looking up from his examination of Nuncius, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader?"

languages.text: {n}ヌンキウスを観察していたエオガンはうなずいた。{/n}「ローグ・トレーダー？」
languages.original_text: {n}Not looking up from his examination of Nuncius, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader?"

traits.locale_text: {n}ヌンキウスを観察していたエオガンはうなずいた。{/n}「ローグ・トレーダー？」

languages.text: {n}Nuncius'u inceleyen Eogunn, başını kaldırmadan baş sallıyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir..."
